name: Caribbean Salad Platter
recipeIngredient: 3 large Mangoes, pitted, peeled and cut into chunks
2 cans (14 oz) Hearts of Palm, drained, rinsed and sliced
2 large Tomatoes, cut into large chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange watercress around the perimeter of a large platter.
2. Arrange alternating rows of mango, hearts of palm and tomatoes to fill the platter.
3. Combine lime juice, coriander and allspice in a small bowl.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Serve with extra lime wedges if desired.
